title: ICAI Halts SPOM Tests from April 11-20 for SPMT Portal Upgrade
content:
# ICAI Halts SPOM Tests from April 11-20 for SPMT Portal Upgrade

Ek important update hai! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne Self-Paced Online Module (SPOM) tests ko temporarily suspend kiya hai.

**Important details to note:**

*   **What:** Self-Paced Online Module (SPOM) tests will not be conducted.
*   **When:** This suspension is from April 11, 2026, to April 20, 2026.
*   **Why:** The halt is due to scheduled maintenance and a software upgrade of the SPMT portal.
*   **Resumption of Slot Booking:** Slot booking for SPMT will resume from April 21, 2026, onwards.

This announcement was made by the Examination Department of ICAI on March 13, 2026.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/announcements/)

*Published on: 15 March 2026*
